title: tmesipteris horomaka
intro: Tmesipteris horomaka, also known as the New Zealand fork fern or Horomaka fork fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tmesipteris horomaka include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
